response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The audio and visual segments perfectly match the reference lyrics. 2. JSON Usage: Fully integrated the reference lyrics for the song performance while manually transcribing the spoken Japanese/English introduction segments. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed both spoken dialogue and song performance precisely using audio triggers, keeping groups of lines highly synchronized and avoiding cascading delay.

subtitles.original: And there's going to be a lot of Eurobeat songs, but also songs that are not Eurobeat as well, new genres as well!
subtitles.english: And there's going to be a lot of Eurobeat songs, but also songs that are not Eurobeat as well, new genres as well!

subtitles.original: So, I hope you guys look forward to that.
subtitles.english: So, I hope you guys look forward to that.

subtitles.original: ね、あの、国内外の様々なクリエイターに
subtitles.english: I've also had various creators from Japan and abroad...

subtitles.original: ユーロビート以外の楽曲も多数作ってもらってます。
subtitles.english: ...create many songs in genres other than Eurobeat.

subtitles.original: A lot of new songs!
subtitles.english: A lot of new songs!

subtitles.original: And I will be performing, of course, performing one of the songs for you today!
subtitles.english: And I will be performing, of course, performing one of the songs for you today!

subtitles.original: 今日もね、あの、一曲披露しようかなと思ってます。
subtitles.english: I'm planning to perform one of them for you today.

subtitles.original: A showcase, yay!
subtitles.english: A showcase, yay!

subtitles.original: The song I'll be showcasing for you today was written and arranged by...
subtitles.english: The song I'll be showcasing for you today was written and arranged by...

subtitles.original: ...the Eurobeat circle SOUND HOLIC-san! Woohoo!
subtitles.english: ...the Eurobeat circle SOUND HOLIC-san! Woohoo!

subtitles.original: Yes, they're very famous for Eurobeat, so I'm really glad, I'm really happy to be able to work with them. Thank you so much.
subtitles.english: Yes, they're very famous for Eurobeat, so I'm really glad, I'm really happy to be able to work with them. Thank you so much.

subtitles.original: えっとね、今回お披露目する楽曲は、
subtitles.english: So, the song I'm debuting today...

subtitles.original: 作曲・編曲、国内のユーロビートを得意とするクリエイターさん、
subtitles.english: ...is composed and arranged by creators who specialize in domestic Eurobeat,

subtitles.original: SOUND HOLICさんでございます！ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: SOUND HOLIC! Thank you so much!

subtitles.original: 新たなユーロビートの見せ方になると思うんで、楽しみにしてて。
subtitles.english: I think it shows a new way of presenting Eurobeat, so look forward to it.

subtitles.original: It's Eurobeat, but there's something about it that's also not very Eurobeat, so I hope you guys know what I mean when I sing it.
subtitles.english: It's Eurobeat, but there's something about it that's also not very Eurobeat, so I hope you guys know what I mean when I sing it.

subtitles.original: Yes, the digital release will be happening on...
subtitles.english: Yes, the digital release will be happening on...

subtitles.original: ...12:00 AM JST, the upcoming 12:00 AM JST after this. So, make sure you're streaming on Spotify and other streaming services, yeah!
subtitles.english: ...12:00 AM JST, the upcoming 12:00 AM JST after this. So, make sure you're streaming on Spotify and other streaming services, yeah!

subtitles.original: このあとね、えっと、デジタルリリースも各配信サイトで行われます。
subtitles.english: After this, it will be digitally released on various streaming platforms.

subtitles.original: えっと、0時に配信されます。
subtitles.english: It will be released at midnight.

subtitles.original: 楽しみにしててね！
subtitles.english: Please look forward to it!

subtitles.original: すごくド派手な曲です。楽しみだ。
subtitles.english: It's a super flashy song. I'm excited!

subtitles.original: And as for the details of the album, I will be talking about that at the very end of this live, so be sure to stick till the end!
subtitles.english: And as for the details of the album, I will be talking about that at the very end of this live, so be sure to stick till the end!

subtitles.original: アルバムの詳細は、このあと最後の方でね、
subtitles.english: As for the album details, near the end...

subtitles.original: えっと、色々説明しちゃうんで、最後まで見てね。
subtitles.english: ...I will explain various things, so make sure to watch until the end!

subtitles.original: All right then, please listen to my new song, BE MY FLAME!
subtitles.english: All right then, please listen to my new song, BE MY FLAME!

subtitles.original: 新しい曲聴いてください、BE MY FLAME!
subtitles.english: Please listen to my new song, BE MY FLAME!

subtitles.english: Crazy thoughts fillin' my head
